title: Section 41
content: (1) Where an order is made under this Chapter reprimanding or suspending an advocate, a record of the punishment shall be entered against his name-- (a) in the case of an advocate whose name is entered in a State roll, in that roll; 1* * * * * and where any order is made removing an advocate from practice, his name shall be struck off the State roll 2*** 2* * * * * (3) Where any advocate is suspended or removed from practice, the certificate granted to him under section 22, in respect of his enrolment shall be recalled.
footnote: 1. Clause (b) omitted by s. 31, ibid. (w.e.f. 31-1-1974). 2. The words "or the common roll, as the case may be" omitted by s. 31, ibid. (w.e.f. 31-1-1974). 3. Sub-section (2) omitted by s. 31, ibid. (w.e.f. 31-1-1974).
